# Lobre — Agentic Infrastructure Engine

> Pay-per-request utility infrastructure for autonomous AI agents.
> 31 endpoints across 6 bundles: trading intelligence, code analysis, NLP research,
> web intelligence, on-chain analytics, and persistent agent memory.
> No sign-up. No API keys. Payment is the credential.
> Settlement: USDC via x402 (on-chain, Base mainnet) or Tempo (MPP).

## Onboarding

- [Onboard](https://lobre.lat/docs): Set up AgentCash wallet and add Lobre
- [OpenAPI spec](https://lobre.lat/api/openapi.json): Machine-readable contract with payment info
- [MCP server](https://lobre.lat/api/mcp): All 31 tools via Streamable HTTP Transport

## Trading Intelligence Endpoints

- [GET vitals](https://lobre.lat/api/v1/trading/engine/vitals): Live BTC/ETH price, 24h change, volume — $0.030
- [GET orderbook-depth](https://lobre.lat/api/v1/trading/engine/orderbook-depth): Orderbook bids/asks, spread, imbalance (?pair=) — $0.050
- [GET mev-risk-index](https://lobre.lat/api/v1/trading/engine/mev-risk-index): MEV sandwich attack risk score 0–100 for current Base block — $0.040
- [GET funding-rates](https://lobre.lat/api/v1/trading/engine/funding-rates): BTC/ETH/SOL perpetual futures funding rates (?symbols=) — $0.030
- [GET whale-tracker](https://lobre.lat/api/v1/trading/engine/whale-tracker): USDC transfers categorized by size (?min_amount=10000) — $0.080
- [GET gas-tracker](https://lobre.lat/api/v1/trading/engine/gas-tracker): Gas prices (slow/standard/fast) for ETH, Base, Solana — $0.020
- [GET token-screener](https://lobre.lat/api/v1/trading/engine/token-screener): Top token movers by price change and volume — $0.050

## Coding Cache Endpoints

- [POST dependency-tree](https://lobre.lat/api/v1/coding/cache/dependency-tree): Import/export dependency graph from JS/TS source — $0.030
- [POST token-compressor](https://lobre.lat/api/v1/coding/cache/token-compressor): Strip comments and whitespace to minimize LLM token usage — $0.030
- [POST syntax-heartbeat](https://lobre.lat/api/v1/coding/cache/syntax-heartbeat): Validate JS/TS/JSX syntax, return parse errors with position hints — $0.030
- [POST refactor-suggest](https://lobre.lat/api/v1/coding/cache/refactor-suggest): Refactoring suggestions with severity ratings — $0.050
- [POST security-audit](https://lobre.lat/api/v1/coding/cache/security-audit): Security audit — SQL injection, XSS, hardcoded secrets — $0.060
- [POST secret-scanner](https://lobre.lat/api/v1/coding/cache/secret-scanner): Detect hardcoded API keys, private keys, tokens — $0.040

## Research Pruner Endpoints

- [POST sentiment](https://lobre.lat/api/v1/analysis/memory/sentiment): Classify text as positive, negative, or neutral — $0.030
- [POST heartbeat](https://lobre.lat/api/v1/analysis/memory/heartbeat): Cosine similarity between two texts — $0.030
- [POST entity-extractor](https://lobre.lat/api/v1/analysis/memory/entity-extractor): Extract named entities (persons, orgs, dates, locations, money) — $0.060
- [POST context-ranker](https://lobre.lat/api/v1/analysis/memory/context-ranker): Re-rank text chunks by semantic relevance to a query — $0.050
- [POST bias-detector](https://lobre.lat/api/v1/analysis/memory/bias-detector): Detect framing bias, sentiment slant, loaded language — $0.050
- [POST fact-linkage](https://lobre.lat/api/v1/analysis/memory/fact-linkage): Verify claims via fact-check database with LLM fallback — $0.120

## Web Intelligence Endpoints

- [GET url-metadata](https://lobre.lat/api/v1/web/intelligence/url-metadata): Title, OG tags, canonical, favicon from any URL — $0.030
- [POST article-parser](https://lobre.lat/api/v1/web/intelligence/article-parser): Clean article text with ads/nav stripped — $0.050
- [POST link-extractor](https://lobre.lat/api/v1/web/intelligence/link-extractor): All links with internal/external classification — $0.030
- [GET screenshot](https://lobre.lat/api/v1/web/intelligence/screenshot): Full-page screenshot as base64 PNG — $0.080

## On-chain Intelligence Endpoints

- [GET wallet-risk-score](https://lobre.lat/api/v1/onchain/wallet-risk-score): Risk score 0–100 for an EVM wallet — $0.060
- [GET contract-summary](https://lobre.lat/api/v1/onchain/contract-summary): Plain-English summary of a smart contract — $0.070
- [POST tx-classifier](https://lobre.lat/api/v1/onchain/tx-classifier): Classify tx as swap/bridge/nft_mint/approval/transfer — $0.040
- [GET token-holders](https://lobre.lat/api/v1/onchain/token-holders): Top holders + Gini coefficient for concentration — $0.050

## Agent Memory Endpoints

- [POST store](https://lobre.lat/api/v1/agent/memory/store): Store memory chunk with auto-embedding — $0.010
- [POST recall](https://lobre.lat/api/v1/agent/memory/recall): Retrieve relevant memories via semantic search — $0.030
- [POST forget](https://lobre.lat/api/v1/agent/memory/forget): Delete a memory by ID — $0.005
- [GET list](https://lobre.lat/api/v1/agent/memory/list): List all memories for a session — $0.010

---

# GET /api/v1/trading/engine/vitals
URL: https://lobre.lat/api/v1/trading/engine/vitals

Live BTC and ETH market vitals from Binance (CoinGecko fallback). Cached 10 seconds.

Price: $0.030 USDC
Method: GET
Request: Optional ?symbols=btc,eth (default: btc,eth — use "btc", "eth", or "btc,eth")
Response: { "success": true, "bundle": "trading_engine", "data": { "source": string, "btc"?: { "price_usd": number, "change_24h_pct": number, "high_24h": number, "low_24h": number, "volume_24h": number }, "eth"?: { "price_usd": number, "change_24h_pct": number, "volume_24h": number }, "timestamp": number } }

---

# GET /api/v1/trading/engine/orderbook-depth
URL: https://lobre.lat/api/v1/trading/engine/orderbook-depth

Orderbook bids/asks for a trading pair. Returns spread (USD and %), top-10 depth on each side, and book imbalance (-1 to 1). Cached 5 seconds.

Price: $0.050 USDC
Method: GET
Request: Optional ?pair=ETH/USDT (default: BTC/USDT)
Response: { "success": true, "bundle": "trading_engine", "data": { "pair": string, "best_bid": number, "best_ask": number, "spread_usd": number, "spread_pct": number, "bid_depth_top10": number, "ask_depth_top10": number, "imbalance": number, "bids": [[price, qty], ...], "asks": [[price, qty], ...], "timestamp": number } }

---

# GET /api/v1/trading/engine/mev-risk-index
URL: https://lobre.lat/api/v1/trading/engine/mev-risk-index

MEV sandwich attack risk score (0–100) for the current Base mainnet block. Cached 30 seconds.

Price: $0.040 USDC
Method: GET
Request: No params.
Response: { "success": true, "bundle": "trading_engine", "data": { "risk_score": number, "risk_level": "low"|"medium"|"high"|"critical", "block_number": number, "total_txs": number, "high_gas_txs": number, "high_gas_ratio_pct": number, "max_same_sender_txs": number, "timestamp": number } }

---

# GET /api/v1/trading/engine/funding-rates
URL: https://lobre.lat/api/v1/trading/engine/funding-rates

Perpetual futures funding rates for BTC, ETH, and SOL from Binance Futures. Includes annualized rate and next funding timestamp. Cached 15 seconds.

Price: $0.030 USDC
Method: GET
Request: Optional ?symbols=BTC,ETH (default: all — BTC,ETH,SOL)
Response: { "success": true, "bundle": "trading_engine", "data": { "source": "binance_futures", "rates": [{ "symbol": string, "funding_rate": number, "rate_pct": string, "annualized_pct": number, "next_funding_ms": number, "mark_price": number, "index_price": number }], "btc_annualized_pct": number, "timestamp": number } }

---

# GET /api/v1/trading/engine/whale-tracker
URL: https://lobre.lat/api/v1/trading/engine/whale-tracker

USDC transfers on Base mainnet categorized by size. Cached 60 seconds.
Categories: Micro Whale ($10K–$99K), Mid Whale ($100K–$999K), Whale ($1M–$9.9M), Mega Whale (>=$10M).

Price: $0.080 USDC
Method: GET
Request: Optional ?min_amount=10000 (floor in USD, default $10K, min $1K)
Response: { "success": true, "bundle": "trading_engine", "data": { "source": "blockscout_base", "categories": { "mega": { "label": "Mega Whale", "range": ">= $10M", "count": number, "transfers": [Transfer] }, "whale": { "label": "Whale", "range": "$1M – $9.9M", "count": number, "transfers": [Transfer] }, "mid": { "label": "Mid Whale", "range": "$100K – $999K", "count": number, "transfers": [Transfer] }, "micro": { "label": "Micro Whale", "range": "$10K – $99K", "count": number, "transfers": [Transfer] } }, "total": number, "min_tracked_usd": number, "timestamp": number } }
Transfer: { "hash": string, "from": string, "to": string, "amount": number, "amount_formatted": string, "token": { "symbol": string, "name": string, "contract": string, "decimals": number }, "block_number": number, "age_seconds": number, "category": string }

---

# GET /api/v1/trading/engine/gas-tracker
URL: https://lobre.lat/api/v1/trading/engine/gas-tracker

Current gas prices for ETH, Base, and Solana — slow, standard, and fast tiers. Cached 15 seconds.

Price: $0.020 USDC
Method: GET
Request: No params.
Response: { "success": true, "bundle": "trading_engine", "data": { "base": { "slow": number, "standard": number, "fast": number, "base_fee": number, "unit": "gwei" }|null, "eth": { "slow": number, "standard": number, "fast": number, "base_fee": number, "unit": "gwei" }|null, "solana": { "low": number, "medium": number, "high": number, "unit": "microlamports" }|null, "timestamp": number } }

---

# GET /api/v1/trading/engine/token-screener
URL: https://lobre.lat/api/v1/trading/engine/token-screener

Scan tokens by 24h price change and volume threshold. Returns top movers sorted by price change magnitude. Cached 60 seconds.

Price: $0.050 USDC
Method: GET
Request: Optional ?price_change_min=5&volume_change_min=1000000&limit=20
Response: { "success": true, "bundle": "trading_engine", "data": { "source": "coingecko", "screened": [{ "symbol": string, "name": string, "price": number, "change_24h_pct": number, "direction": "up"|"down", "volume_24h_usd": number, "high_24h": number, "low_24h": number, "market_cap": number }], "count": number, "filters": { "price_change_min_pct": number, "volume_24h_min_usd": number }, "timestamp": number } }

---

# POST /api/v1/coding/cache/dependency-tree
URL: https://lobre.lat/api/v1/coding/cache/dependency-tree

Parse static import and export dependency graph from JavaScript or TypeScript source code.

Price: $0.030 USDC
Method: POST
Request body: { "code": string (required), "filename": string (optional) }
Response: { "success": true, "bundle": "coding_cache", "data": { "imports": string[], "exports": string[], "depth": number } }

---

# POST /api/v1/coding/cache/token-compressor
URL: https://lobre.lat/api/v1/coding/cache/token-compressor

Strip comments and collapse whitespace from source code to minimize LLM token usage.

Price: $0.030 USDC
Method: POST
Request body: { "raw_code": string (required) }
Response: { "success": true, "bundle": "coding_cache", "data": { "compressed": string, "ratio_pct": number, "original_bytes": number, "compressed_bytes": number } }

---

# POST /api/v1/coding/cache/syntax-heartbeat
URL: https://lobre.lat/api/v1/coding/cache/syntax-heartbeat

Validate JavaScript, TypeScript, or JSX syntax. Returns parse errors with position hints.

Price: $0.030 USDC
Method: POST
Request body: { "code": string (required) }
Response: { "success": true, "bundle": "coding_cache", "data": { "valid": boolean, "errors": string[], "warnings": string[], "lines": number } }

---

# POST /api/v1/coding/cache/refactor-suggest
URL: https://lobre.lat/api/v1/coding/cache/refactor-suggest

AI-powered refactoring suggestions with severity ratings and overall quality score.

Price: $0.050 USDC
Method: POST
Request body: { "code": string (required), "language": string (optional, default: "typescript") }
Response: { "success": true, "bundle": "coding_cache", "data": { "suggestions": [{ "type": string, "line_hint": number|null, "description": string, "severity": "low"|"medium"|"high" }], "overall_quality": "poor"|"fair"|"good"|"excellent", "summary": string } }

---

# POST /api/v1/coding/cache/security-audit
URL: https://lobre.lat/api/v1/coding/cache/security-audit

AI-powered static security audit: SQL injection, XSS, insecure eval, hardcoded secrets, and other vulnerability patterns.

Price: $0.060 USDC
Method: POST
Request body: { "code": string (required), "language": string (optional, default: "typescript") }
Response: { "success": true, "bundle": "coding_cache", "data": { "vulnerabilities": [{ "id": string, "severity": "low"|"medium"|"high"|"critical", "title": string, "description": string, "line_hint": number|null, "recommendation": string }], "risk_score": number, "summary": string } }

---

# POST /api/v1/coding/cache/secret-scanner
URL: https://lobre.lat/api/v1/coding/cache/secret-scanner

Detect hardcoded secrets using pattern matching — 16+ types including API keys, private keys, passwords, tokens.

Price: $0.040 USDC
Method: POST
Request body: { "code": string (required), "strict": boolean (optional, default: false) }
Response: { "success": true, "bundle": "coding_cache", "data": { "secrets_found": [{ "type": string, "line": number, "severity": "medium"|"high"|"critical", "match_hint": string, "recommendation": string }], "risk_level": "NONE"|"MEDIUM"|"HIGH"|"CRITICAL", "total_found": number, "scanned_lines": number, "timestamp": number } }

---

# POST /api/v1/analysis/memory/sentiment
URL: https://lobre.lat/api/v1/analysis/memory/sentiment

Classify text sentiment with confidence score and dominant emotion.

Price: $0.030 USDC
Method: POST
Request body: { "text": string (required, max ~2000 chars) }
Response: { "success": true, "bundle": "live_vector_pruner", "data": { "sentiment": "positive"|"negative"|"neutral", "confidence": number, "dominant_emotion": string|null, "brief_reason": string|null, "char_count": number, "timestamp": number } }

---

# POST /api/v1/analysis/memory/heartbeat
URL: https://lobre.lat/api/v1/analysis/memory/heartbeat

Cosine similarity between two texts using sentence embeddings. Runs on-device.

Price: $0.030 USDC
Method: POST
Request body: { "text_a": string (required), "text_b": string (required) }
Response: { "success": true, "bundle": "live_vector_pruner", "data": { "similarity": number, "similarity_pct": number, "vector_dims": number, "interpretation": "distinct"|"related"|"very similar", "timestamp": number } }

---

# POST /api/v1/analysis/memory/entity-extractor
URL: https://lobre.lat/api/v1/analysis/memory/entity-extractor

Extract named entities: PERSON, ORG, LOC, DATE, MONEY, PRODUCT, OTHER. Each entity includes confidence level.

Price: $0.060 USDC
Method: POST
Request body: { "text": string (required, max ~3000 chars) }
Response: { "success": true, "bundle": "live_vector_pruner", "data": { "entities": [{ "text": string, "type": "PERSON"|"ORG"|"LOC"|"DATE"|"MONEY"|"PRODUCT"|"OTHER", "confidence": "low"|"medium"|"high" }], "entity_count": number } }

---

# POST /api/v1/analysis/memory/context-ranker
URL: https://lobre.lat/api/v1/analysis/memory/context-ranker

Re-rank a list of text chunks by semantic relevance to a query. Returns chunks sorted by score descending.

Price: $0.050 USDC
Method: POST
Request body: { "query": string (required), "chunks": string[] (required, non-empty) }
Response: { "success": true, "bundle": "live_vector_pruner", "data": { "ranked": [{ "index": number, "chunk": string, "score": number }], "query_vector_dims": number, "timestamp": number } }

---

# POST /api/v1/analysis/memory/bias-detector
URL: https://lobre.lat/api/v1/analysis/memory/bias-detector

Detect framing bias, sentiment slant, and loaded language in text. Returns bias types, examples, and score 0–100.

Price: $0.050 USDC
Method: POST
Request body: { "text": string (required, max ~3000 chars) }
Response: { "success": true, "bundle": "live_vector_pruner", "data": { "bias_detected": boolean, "bias_types": ("framing"|"sentiment"|"loaded_language"|"omission"|"selection")[], "confidence": "low"|"medium"|"high", "bias_score": number, "examples": [{ "phrase": string, "type": string, "explanation": string }], "summary": string } }

---

# POST /api/v1/analysis/memory/fact-linkage
URL: https://lobre.lat/api/v1/analysis/memory/fact-linkage

Verify a claim against fact-check databases. Falls back to LLM analysis for claims not yet reviewed by human fact-checkers.

Price: $0.120 USDC
Method: POST
Request body: { "claim": string (required, max ~512 chars), "language": string (optional, default: "en") }
Response (google_factcheck source): { "success": true, "bundle": "live_vector_pruner", "data": { "source": "google_factcheck", "claims": [{ "claim_text": string, "claimant": string, "reviews": [{ "publisher": string, "url": string, "rating": string }] }], "verified": number, "unverified": number, "timestamp": number } }
Response (llm source): { "success": true, "bundle": "live_vector_pruner", "data": { "source": "llm", "assessment": "likely_true"|"likely_false"|"misleading"|"unverifiable", "confidence": "low"|"medium"|"high", "reasoning": string, "caveats": string, "sources_note": string, "timestamp": number } }

---

# GET /api/v1/web/intelligence/url-metadata
URL: https://lobre.lat/api/v1/web/intelligence/url-metadata

Extract title, description, OG tags, canonical URL, and favicon from any web page.

Price: $0.030 USDC
Method: GET
Request: Required ?url=https://example.com
Response: { "success": true, "bundle": "web_intelligence", "data": { "url": string, "title": string|null, "description": string|null, "og_title": string|null, "og_image": string|null, "og_type": string|null, "canonical": string|null, "favicon": string|null, "timestamp": number } }

---

# POST /api/v1/web/intelligence/article-parser
URL: https://lobre.lat/api/v1/web/intelligence/article-parser

Fetch a URL and return clean article text — scripts, ads, and nav stripped.

Price: $0.050 USDC
Method: POST
Request body: { "url": string (required) }
Response: { "success": true, "bundle": "web_intelligence", "data": { "url": string, "title": string|null, "text": string, "char_count": number, "timestamp": number } }

---

# POST /api/v1/web/intelligence/link-extractor
URL: https://lobre.lat/api/v1/web/intelligence/link-extractor

Extract all links from a web page with text context and internal/external classification.

Price: $0.030 USDC
Method: POST
Request body: { "url": string (required), "internal_only": boolean (optional, default: false) }
Response: { "success": true, "bundle": "web_intelligence", "data": { "url": string, "total_links": number, "internal_count": number, "external_count": number, "links": [{ "href": string, "text": string, "internal": boolean }], "timestamp": number } }

---

# GET /api/v1/web/intelligence/screenshot
URL: https://lobre.lat/api/v1/web/intelligence/screenshot

Full-page screenshot of any URL as base64 PNG. Renders JavaScript. Configurable viewport.

Price: $0.080 USDC
Method: GET
Request: Required ?url=https://example.com — Optional ?width=1280&height=800
Response: { "success": true, "bundle": "web_intelligence", "data": { "url": string, "screenshot_base64": string, "format": "png", "viewport": { "width": number, "height": number }, "timestamp": number } }

---

# GET /api/v1/onchain/wallet-risk-score
URL: https://lobre.lat/api/v1/onchain/wallet-risk-score

Risk score 0–100 for an EVM wallet based on transaction history and behavior patterns.

Price: $0.060 USDC
Method: GET
Request: Required ?address=0x... (EVM wallet address)
Response: { "success": true, "bundle": "onchain_intelligence", "data": { "address": string, "risk_score": number, "risk_level": "none"|"low"|"medium"|"high"|"critical"|"unknown", "factors": string[], "tx_count": number, "timestamp": number } }

---

# GET /api/v1/onchain/contract-summary
URL: https://lobre.lat/api/v1/onchain/contract-summary

Plain-English summary of a smart contract using ABI and source code from Blockscout.

Price: $0.070 USDC
Method: GET
Request: Required ?address=0x... (smart contract address)
Response: { "success": true, "bundle": "onchain_intelligence", "data": { "address": string, "name": string, "summary": string, "functions": string[], "timestamp": number } }

---

# POST /api/v1/onchain/tx-classifier
URL: https://lobre.lat/api/v1/onchain/tx-classifier

Classify a transaction as swap, bridge, NFT mint, approval, or transfer by input signature.

Price: $0.040 USDC
Method: POST
Request body: { "tx_hash": string (required, 0x + 64 hex chars) }
Response: { "success": true, "bundle": "onchain_intelligence", "data": { "tx_hash": string, "type": "swap"|"bridge"|"nft_mint"|"approval"|"transfer", "protocol": string|null, "value_eth": number|null, "from": string, "to": string, "timestamp": number } }

---

# GET /api/v1/onchain/token-holders
URL: https://lobre.lat/api/v1/onchain/token-holders

Top holders for a token contract with share percentage and Gini coefficient for concentration analysis.

Price: $0.050 USDC
Method: GET
Request: Required ?address=0x... (token contract) — Optional ?limit=20 (5–50)
Response: { "success": true, "bundle": "onchain_intelligence", "data": { "token": string, "holder_count": number, "gini_coefficient": number, "top_holders": [{ "address": string, "quantity": string, "share_pct": number }], "timestamp": number } }

---

# POST /api/v1/agent/memory/store
URL: https://lobre.lat/api/v1/agent/memory/store

Store a text memory chunk for an agent session with auto-embedding. Use consistent session_id per agent run.

Price: $0.010 USDC
Method: POST
Request body: { "text": string (required, max 4000 chars), "session_id": string (required), "tags": string[] (optional) }
Response: { "success": true, "bundle": "agent_memory", "data": { "memory_id": string, "session_id": string, "char_count": number, "timestamp": string } }

---

# POST /api/v1/agent/memory/recall
URL: https://lobre.lat/api/v1/agent/memory/recall

Retrieve the most relevant memories for a query within a session using semantic search.

Price: $0.030 USDC
Method: POST
Request body: { "query": string (required), "session_id": string (required), "limit": number (optional, 1–20, default 5), "threshold": number (optional, 0–1, default 0.5) }
Response: { "success": true, "bundle": "agent_memory", "data": { "session_id": string, "query": string, "results": [{ "memory_id": string, "score": number, "text": string, "tags": string[], "timestamp": string }], "count": number } }

---

# POST /api/v1/agent/memory/forget
URL: https://lobre.lat/api/v1/agent/memory/forget

Delete a specific memory by ID. Session ownership is verified before deletion.

Price: $0.005 USDC
Method: POST
Request body: { "memory_id": string (required), "session_id": string (required) }
Response: { "success": true, "bundle": "agent_memory", "data": { "memory_id": string, "deleted": true } }

---

# GET /api/v1/agent/memory/list
URL: https://lobre.lat/api/v1/agent/memory/list

List all stored memories for an agent session, sorted by recency.

Price: $0.010 USDC
Method: GET
Request: Required ?session_id=... — Optional ?limit=20 (1–100)
Response: { "success": true, "bundle": "agent_memory", "data": { "session_id": string, "memories": [{ "memory_id": string, "text": string, "tags": string[], "char_count": number, "timestamp": string }], "count": number } }
